category_sources: Official NEST documentation identifies it as NEST Simulator documentation.
source_facts.description says it is the Neural Simulation Tool with PyNEST bindings.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title uses NEST Simulator.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is linked from the documentation site.
Official nest-simulator.org documentation redirects to Read the Docs stable documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/nest/nest-simulator; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official documentation and repository identify NEST as a simulator.
source_facts.description mentions neural simulation and Python3 bindings.
